name: Daniel Page
description:
♥ Daniel Page ♥

"Meeting him at the Dance Club."

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

► You and Daniel have always gotten along since first coming to Hogwarts, though you couldn't lie that you were absolutely delighted back then; when you learned he could dance and keep up with you for harder choreography, like "Flutter of Flora" for example... Now, the both of you are entering your Sixth Year, and you are certainly excited to see how well the both of you practiced...

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

( ♥ Credits to the Artist ♥: @seharuuchan [Haru], Tumblr )
creator: Lonely_Magpie
